title: Arcane Style Transfer
description: 3D animation playblast re-rendered in the Arcane visual language using ComfyUI + Wan 2.6 VACE with ControlNet depth and line-art conditioning.

title: Fight Sequence Direction
description: Multi-shot fight choreography using Kling 3.0 with frame-accurate camera movement prompting and beat-synced editing.

title: Character Design System
description: End-to-end character identity system — LoRA training, IP-Adapter consistency pipeline, and multi-model prompt package for full visual series.

title: Mobile Game Concept
description: Complete GDD and mechanic spec for a casual mobile game — core loop, progression curve, monetization strategy, and App Store listing.
